news.t: Heightened rate volatility points to these opportunities in stocks, bonds for ETF investors, says State Street's Michael Arone
Small-cap ETFs take a big step higher
Small-cap and midcap ETFs charge higher as investors continue to rotate
Small caps outperform after recessions, so 'you have history on your side,' money manager says

holdings.infoBox: SPSM is an equity ETF with a total of 611 individual holdings. The top holdings are Semtech stock at 0.80%, Sanmina at 0.76%, Viavi Solutions at 0.65%, FormFactor at 0.62%, and Element Solutions at 0.59%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 600 Small Cap ETF (SPSM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 index, a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap stocks selected by the S&P Committee. SPSM was launched on Jul 8, 2013 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Navigating the Small-Cap ETF Disconnect
data.text: There has been a visible disparity between the performance of U.S. small-caps and U.S. large-caps so far this year. What hasn't been too visible is a lot of investor interest in the action.

data.title: BoA's Jill Carey Hill's bullish case for small cap stocks
data.text: Jill Carey Hall, Bank of America Securities head of U.S. small and mid cap strategy, joins 'Closing Bell: Overtime' to discuss her bullish case for small cap stocks.

data.title: Small-cap ETFs rally
data.text: Small-cap exchange-traded funds outperformed Wednesday on a strong day for the broad markets. The iShares Russell 2000 ETF gained 2% late morning, as did the SPDR Portfolio S&P 600 Small Cap ETF.

data.title: Small-cap ETFs take a big step higher
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to smaller companies rallied Wednesday as investors turned back to stocks that haven't participated as much in 2020's big run-up. The iShares Russell 2000 ETF , the...

data.title: Small-cap and midcap ETFs charge higher as investors continue to rotate
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to smaller companies outperformed Tuesday, extending a winning streak that suggests investors may be ready to look beyond the behemoths that have dominated markets ...

data.title: Small caps outperform after recessions, so 'you have history on your side,' money manager says
data.text: But it's too soon to tell whether small caps can hang onto recent gains, traders say.
